chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1738 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.8335/2019 (C/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.7696/2019 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 22.01.2020 Mr. A. R. Faruq Pirzada assisted by M/s Ghulam Hyder Daudpoto and Faraz Khan, Advocates for petitioners. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Pirzada submits that petitioners could not appear as they have life threat. Investigation Officer along with reply to the contempt application filed copy of order dated 09.01.2020 passed by Civil / Family Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Kashmore @ Kandhkot in Crime No.208/2019 of P.S “A” Section, Kandhkot under Sections 452, 365-B, 34, PPC, which reflects that case has been disposed of under “C” class, and the Magistrate has agreed to the conclusion of the Investigation Officer. In the view of above development, Mr. Pirzada, learned counsel for petitioners states that purpose of filing of the petition has been achieved. However, regarding high headedness of the police, police officials deny the allegation. Mr. Pirzada submits that the petition may be disposed of with direction to the police officials to provide protection to the petitioners. Since case / crime has been disposed of under “C” class, the petition is accordingly disposed of with direction to the police officials, particularly SSP Kashmore @ Kandhkot as well as SSP Sukkur to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Let the copy of this order be sent to SSP Kashmore @ Kandhkot and SSP Sukkur by fax for compliance.

Since case / crime has been disposed of under “C” class, the petition is accordingly disposed of with direction to the police officials, particularly SSP Kashmore @ Kandhkot as well as SSP Sukkur to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Let the copy of this order be sent to SSP Kashmore @ Kandhkot and SSP Sukkur by fax for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
